detail.description: Tyler Tolbert singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Alec Bohm. Nick Loftin to 3rd. Starling Marte to 2nd.
Tyler Tolbert homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Tyler Tolbert doubles (1) on a line drive to center fielder Derek Hill. Nick Loftin scores.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to shortstop Trea Turner. Starling Marte to 3rd.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to right fielder Gabriel Rincones Jr.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to third baseman Alec Bohm, deflected by pitcher Jesús Luzardo.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to second baseman A.J. Ewing.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to shortstop Francisco Lindor. Isaac Collins to 3rd. Michael Massey to 2nd.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to shortstop Francisco Lindor. Nick Loftin to 3rd. Isaac Collins to 2nd.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to third baseman Bo Bichette. Michael Massey to 3rd.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a line drive to right fielder Carson Benge. Michael Massey to 2nd.
Tyler Tolbert homers (2) on a line drive to left field. Michael Massey scores.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Carter Jensen to 3rd.

Tyler Tolbert singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Tyler Tolbert out at 2nd on the throw, left fielder Chandler Simpson to shortstop Taylor Walls to second baseman Richie Palacios.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a bunt ground ball to pitcher Andrew Abbott.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a line drive to right fielder James Wood.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a line drive to center fielder Ryan Kreidler.
Tyler Tolbert singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cody Bellinger.
